utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with any extra services and costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present: (1) destination is specified as Lisbon, Portugal; (2) travel_dates are provided (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09); (3) transportation includes flight details (type, airline, cost); (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, location, and cost; (5) activities list several activities with names, types, durations, and costs; (6) additional_services include dining suggestions with price details and an estimated total dining cost; (7) total_budget is given as 875.0 EUR. Each required element is fully specified with the expected details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Lisbon, Portugal), transportation via Budget Airlines, accommodation at Backpacker's Base, four activities (City Walking Tour, Street Art Tour, Hiking Expedition5, and Hiking Expedition4), and several dining suggestions (Italian Trattoria, Vegan Bistro9, and French Café). From the ground-truth data: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 7; Budget Airlines (Economy Class) has a rating of 10; Backpacker's Base has a rating of 7; City Walking Tour has a rating of 9; Street Art Tour has a rating of 9; Hiking Expedition corresponds to 'Hiking Expedition' with a rating of 10 (the names Hiking Expedition4 and Hiking Expedition5 appear to be variants of the same base activity, so both map to that rating); Italian Trattoria is rated 7; Vegan Bistro9 aligns with 'Vegan Bistro' rated 10; French Café is rated 7. The Spanish restaurant entry in the package lacks a name, so it cannot be mapped.
